videoSnippet.title: Magnus Carlsen vs Javokhir Sindarov || FIDE World Rapid Team Championships 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Carlsen, Magnus (2832) - Sindarov, Javokhir (2718)
FIDE World Rapid & Blitz Team Chess Championships 2026 (Chess.com) [09] 2026.06.19
E04 Catalan, open, 5.Nf3

1.d4 d5 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 Nf6 4.g3 dxc4 5.Bg2 Bb4+ 6.Nbd2 b5 7.O-O Bb7 8.Nxc4 bxc4 9.Qa4+ Nc6 10.Ne5 Nd5 11.Qb5 a6 12.Qxb7 Na5 13.Bxd5 Nxb7 14.Bxb7 Rb8 15.Bc6+ Kf8 16.Bf3 Bd6 17.Nc6 Qe8 18.Nxb8 Qxb8 19.e4 e5 20.Be3 Ke7 21.Rab1 Rd8 22.d5 Qb4 23.Rfc1 Rb8 24.a3 Qb3 25.Kg2 c3 26.Bd1 Qc4 27.b4 Qxe4+ 28.Kg1 a5 29.Bc2 Qxd5 30.Bb3 Qa8 31.Rxc3 axb4 32.axb4 Rxb4 33.Rbc1 Qb7 34.Bc2 g6 35.h4 Rb2 36.Rc4 f5 37.Bd3 Rb3 38.Bg5+ Ke6 39.Bc2 Rb2 40.Rc3 Kd7 41.Ba4+ Ke6 42.Bc2 Qb4 43.Bd3 e4 44.Bc4+ Kd7 45.Bg8 Rb1 46.Kg2 Rxc1 47.Rxc1 Qb2 48.Rd1 Qc3 49.Be3 Ke7 50.Rc1 Qb2 51.Bc4 Be5 52.Rd1 Qc2 53.Rc1 Qb2 54.Rd1 Bd6 55.Bg5+ Kd7 56.Be3 Qa3 57.Bg8 Qc3 58.Rd4 Ke7 59.Bxh7 Bc5 60.Bg5+ Kf7 61.Rd7+ Ke6 62.Rd2 Qg7
